free_text: Complete and incomplete fusion studies in 7Li and 16O
induced reactions on 51V by measurement of excitation
The targets were obtained by rolling vanadium foils
by using the rolling machine at TIFR. The thickness
of the targets for the excitation function and range
measurements was about 8.0 micrometer for 7Li and
2.0-4.0 micrometer for 16O. The stacks were formed by
thick aluminum foils as catcher cum energy degraders
The beam spot on the targets was limited to 5.0 mm in
diameter by using a stainless steel collimator in
The absolute errors of 8% consists of
The analysis of the gamma-ray spectra,
The uncertainties caused by the large size of
the irradiation area and the non-uniformities of the
No decay data given in Pramana 52(1999)609
